violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in drawer cooler have an accumulation of food debris and need cleaning. Fryers need cleaning.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Ware wash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Multiple cycles needed before sanitizing temperature was maintained at dish machine. Ensure proper temperatures are maintained.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Drain in corner at dish machine clogged and overflowing. Needs to be cleared.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floor has a buildup of grease around/under fryers and needs cleaning. Syrup spill/leak in BOH storage hall at soda dispensing equipment. Needs cleaning. Food/debris build up under equipment and shelving units in storage hall, walk in coolers/freezer, and on cook line. Need cleaning.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
